title: anglensss pvp modpack
description: Mods that i use for pvp (Im bad at pvp)
body:
**I have basically abandoned this pack since I don't PvP anymore, feel free to use it but know it is unlikely to recieve any updates.**

# TL;DR
Performance + pvp, thats basically it.

# About
This modpack includes performance mods, qol mods, and pvp mods. The pack is the mods that I use for pvp (it should work with most forms of pvp, im not good at any kind of pvp so not a good judge), using it for survival would work but I would recommend that you use another better pack for that.


# Quick note
I will update the pack when the servers I play on update to 1.21 and I will not take into consideration what others may want with this pack, it is simply the mods that I use.
